name: TWK10 frail older adults randomized trial
summary: Randomized, double-blind trial testing Lactobacillus plantarum TWK10 low-dose or high-dose supplementation versus placebo for muscle mass and functional performance in frail older adults.
population: Adults aged 55 to 85 years with mild frailty grades 1 to 4

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in Adults aged 55 to 85 years with mild frailty grades 1 to 4. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
